events.title: UnitedHealth Group reaches best available historical close
events.summary: UnitedHealth Group reached its best available historical closing price of USD 625.25.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: UnitedHealth Group added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: UnitedHealth Group is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Healthcare companies are judged by regulation, innovation, product durability and the ability to convert demand into long-term earnings.
